queries.question: For each physicist, list the fields they are working in.
queries.sql: select physicists.name , fields.fieldname from Physicist_Fields join Fields on Physicist_Fields.fieldId = Fields.id join Physicists on Physicist_Fields.physicistId = Physicists.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?fieldname WHERE {
  ?physicist_fields a :Physicist_Fields .
  ?fields a :Fields .
  ?physicist_fields p:hasFields ?fields .
  ?physicists a :Physicists .
  ?physicist_fields p:hasPhysicists ?physicists .
  ?physicists p:name ?name .
  ?fields p:fieldName ?fieldname .
}

queries.question: Show me the fields that each physicist works in.
queries.sql: SELECT Fields.fieldName  from Physicist_Fields join Fields on Physicist_Fields.fieldId = Fields.id join Physicists on Physicist_Fields.physicistId = Physicists.id   GROUP BY Physicist_Fields.fieldId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Physicist_Fields.physicistId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Physicists)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the fields that each physicist works in.
